headline: Payment Processing Stocks Q4 Results: Benchmarking Jack Henry (NASDAQ:JKHY)
summary: Earnings results often indicate what direction a company will take in the months ahead. With Q4 behind us, let’s have a look at Jack Henry (NASDAQ:JKHY) and its peers.
